name: Garden Party leather tote
description:
Hermès Garden Party 49 Voyage Toile & Gold Negonda with Palladium Hardware - 2020, Z

Great used condition apart from mark shown in photos. This color combo is very rare and cannot be found online. Comes with dustbag and zoomoni organizer.

Perfect travel bag, work bag, large tote, weekender bag.

I got this as a push present from my hubby but sadly haven’t used it enough and it’s just been sitting in my closet! It was purchased through a reputable seller JaneFinds and I’ve included the receipt in the photos. The small mark can likely be cleaned professionally if desired. 

As a renowned symbol of practical luxury, the Garden Party has stood the test of time. With handles comparable to those of the iconic Birkin, this tote boasts a durable leather base designed for frequent use. This specific model is the highly sought-after 49cm TGM, showcasing Gold Negonda leather accents on a timeless Toile exterior. Manufactured in 2020 and in great condition, this oversized tote is the ideal choice for those embracing the growing trend of larger bags.
Interior is lined in matching leather. Hermès craftsmanship is evident in the hand-stitched saddle stitch, a technique that uses two needles working in opposite directions through pre-punched holes. Each piece is completed by a single artisan.
Year: 2020
Color: toile and gold
Stamp: Z 2020
Leather: Negonda
Hardware: Palladium
